weekly_win.headline: Landed the Henderson Account!
weekly_win.detail: After three months of hard work and outstanding collaboration, we have officially signed one of our biggest clients to date.

announcements.title: Welcome to the Team Noticeboard!
announcements.body: Everything you see here is controlled by editing data.json on GitHub. Change anything and push — it updates within minutes.

announcements.title: All-Hands Meeting This Friday
announcements.body: Please join the all-hands call at 10am sharp. Dial-in details have been sent via email. Attendance is mandatory.

announcements.title: Office Closure — Bank Holiday Monday
announcements.body: The office will be closed on Monday. All urgent queries should be directed to the on-call team. Enjoy the long weekend!

target.label: Monthly Enrollment Target
target.message: We need a Serious push to be reaching this. lets aim for 1 enrollment / shift / person

tasks.text: Book team lunch for end of month

ticker: Welcome to the new and improved team noticeboard!
All-Hands meeting this Friday at 10am — do not forget!
Q1 expense reports are due by end of week
Big shoutout to Sarah for landing the Henderson account!
Coffee machine on 3rd floor is back in service
Reminder: lock your screen when stepping away from your desk
We are at 74% of our monthly target — let's finish strong!

reviews_hotel.author: Frequent Traveller
reviews_hotel.text: A jewel of a hotel with always wonderful staff. Hawa at check-in was very polite, efficient and professional. She really cared about her guests and made me feel recognised and at home. My room was modern, cosy and the bed was incredibly comfortable.

reviews_hotel.author: Business Guest
reviews_hotel.text: We had a great experience for our business event held here. From organising right through to the end it was fantastic. All guests were very happy. Thanks to Hawa, Rohan, Aron and Anna — we highly recommend this hotel.

reviews_hotel.author: London Visitor
reviews_hotel.text: Without exception, the staff were kind, polite and efficient. All the staff — even those you passed in the corridor — were genuinely friendly and smiled every time. The hotel is clean, modern, and comfortable with good transport links. Definitely recommend.

reviews_hotel.author: Weekend Stay
reviews_hotel.text: From the minute we walked in, Lucia on reception set the bar. She was friendly, helpful and full of energy. The room was clean, modern and well-furnished. Linen and towels were of excellent quality. Will stay again without hesitation.

reviews_restaurant.author: Karen M.
reviews_restaurant.text: I spent 5 days at the DoubleTree and the best part of every day was seeing Syuzanna's smiling face at breakfast. Nora was also a joy — always ready to help. The food was excellent throughout. I highly recommend eating here, you won't regret it.

reviews_restaurant.author: Donna R.
reviews_restaurant.text: Third time stopping here and a great hotel. Kante who works in the bar and restaurant is always smiling, polite and happy to help wherever he can. A real credit to the hotel — consistently wonderful service every single visit.

reviews_restaurant.author: Elizabeth S.
reviews_restaurant.text: Fast, attentive and friendly service with great food! Kante was absolutely fantastic — the pizza was delicious and came quickly even for our group of 7 at a busy time. Easy five stars. Will be back very soon.

reviews_restaurant.author: Nazmul H.
reviews_restaurant.text: Sakshi was friendly and helpful throughout our visit. Service was excellent, atmosphere was great and the ambience was clean and tidy. A wonderful dining experience in a lovely setting. Will definitely return for dinner again.
